title: Perfect Jasmine Rice
summary: Want to know how to cook perfect rice? We’re here to show you how with this incredibly simple step-by-step guide. You’ll never make disappointing rice again.

method.description: Add the rice to a saucepan and wash it until the water runs clear, then drain.

Add the water to the saucepan with the rice and set the pan over a high heat. Bring it to the boil, place a tight-fitting lid on, turn the heat down to low and let it steam for 12 mins – do not remove the lid during this time.
Once the 12 mins have passed, remove the pan from the heat. Fluff the rice with a fork then pop the lid back on and leave it for another 10 mins to finish steaming.
Before serving, fluff the rice using a fork.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
